about:
Everdream Jerky is a home business in the Adelaide Hills.

What began in 2023 with just Barbecue and Hot Chilli has grown into a range of eight flavours, all handcrafted in small batches for quality and flavour.

I'm proud to bring you real ingredients and real taste—no shortcuts.

products.name: Barbecue
products.description: The original flavour. Marinated in a blend of barbecue sauce, soy sauce, Worcestershire. A sweet blend with a chewy consistency.

products.name: Smokey BBQ
products.description: The classic barbecue flavour with a Smokey edge. Dryer than its brother, with a hint of campfire that keeps you coming back.

products.name: Teriyaki
products.description: Sweet, sticky and full in flavour. A rich glaze of teriyaki sauce and soy for those who love bold Japanese flavours.

products.name: Korean BBQ
products.description: Bulgogi marinade with a dash of soy and fresh garlic - Korean BBQ with its rich, unique flavour is a must try.

products.name: Sweet Chilli
products.description: The familiar taste of sweet chilli creates a tacky beef jerky different to the other flavours. A very mild spice that is hardly noticed.

products.name: Exotic Spice
products.description: A slightly spicy, South Korean marinade gives Exotic Spice its uncanny flavour. Tends to be dryer than other flavours.

products.name: Hot Chilli
products.description: A Hot Chilli that never lets the chilli fans down. Its barbecue flavour is dried out by chilli and the seeds give it extra texture and heat.

products.name: Roast Lamb
products.description: Lamb topside is a lean cut of lamb that is perfect for Jerky. A barbecue base with fresh rosemary and garlic - tastes just like a Sunday roast.

products.name: Pet treats
products.description:
Delicious dehydrated sticks of chicken breast - Your dog will be dreaming of these healthy natural treats!
Available in one size: 100g for $10.
